title: Aurora Bazaar: Shopping-Feed Re-Ranker (NDCG@k)
strategies: as-presented passthrough: return the retrieval order unchanged, reproducing the evaluator's weak random-ordering reference (~0.1)
single-signal greedy: sort by the universal quality prior (star-rating feature), which has a positive taste weight in every session but ignores session-specific tastes
pointwise learning-to-rank: fit a ridge/least-squares scoring model on the historical log (features -> graded label) and rank candidates by the predicted score, exploiting ALL features
richer LTR: per-session feature normalization, pairwise/listwise objectives, quantile-calibrated scores, or ensembling the rating prior with the learned model to squeeze more NDCG on noisy sessions
